summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
summary.en: Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力

  • 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据、prompt 相关功能、提示词与任务引导。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面

  • 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据、核心运行时行为、data 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 配置行为、Web 客户端流程、角色与职业元数据。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

trim title before updating session相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了trim title before updating session相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

update chat dialog component相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了update chat dialog component相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 mobile 相关功能、proposal 相关功能、分布式会话运行时。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Model

  • Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata, Prompt, prompt and task guidance.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

HagiPower / Hero features

  • Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata, core runtime behavior, Data.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects configuration behavior, web client flows, hero and role metadata.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to trim title before updating session.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing issues related entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to update chat dialog component.
  • Impact: Affects Mobile, Proposal, distributed session runtime.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.
